_publications._publicationTitle: C-Fiber Loss as a Possible Cause of Neuropathic Pain in Schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: QST did not detect any significant differences between schwannomatosis patients and healthy controls with regard to cold and warm temperature detection thresholds (t(76) = 0.496, p = 0.621 and t(76) = 0.384, p = 0.702, respectively)
details: QST detected no significant differences between schwannomatosis patients and healthy controls for cold/warm temperature detection thresholds, mechanical detection thresholds, or vibration detection thresholds.
